title: EC Epic Fight Compat
description: adds epic fight compatability to Expanded Combat
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ec-epic-fight-compat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![L_Ender's Cataclysm Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7db449d64830a8a5302c1c9bb607c563dfc6d9c9_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
A Mod adding compatibility with [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)'s weapon animation system for Expanded Combat and plugins for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) Made By Userofbricks. Curently the mod adds support for all weapons added by the base mod Expanded combat. > > As of verion 1.2.0 of this mod it is now posible to add models for curios items. models for standard shaped gauntlets have been added however custom modeled gauntlets such as Maulers from the base mod or Amethyst Crab Gauntlets from the Cataclysm plugin won't have a model. However models for quivers ahave yet to be added. \ \ Click the banner to get the discount:
